$comment: Presence of this file enables the dispatch-auto Pi extension in this repo. This is the committed baseline (shared across machines, Pi-everywhere). Per-machine overrides (Claude accounts, profile paths, Pi configDir routing) belong in `agents/orchestration.local.json` (gitignored).

$schema_notes.timeoutMinutes: Wall-clock cap per subprocess. Env DISPATCH_AUTO_TIMEOUT_MS=<ms> wins over both root and per-role for one-off use.
$schema_notes.defaultPiProvider: Token value substituted for `$defaultPiProvider` in model preset args. Swap this single field to globally re-route all non-Codex/non-Claude models when an account runs out.
$schema_notes.modelPresets: Named arg-arrays appended to the launch command. Reference one from a role via `roles.<Role>.modelPreset`. Use `$defaultPiProvider` token to make the preset provider-agnostic; explicit provider strings (e.g. `openai-codex/`) bypass token substitution.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.binary: 'pi' (default) or 'claude'. Claude uses --session-id on first call, --resume on subsequent — cycle-isolated per channel.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.configDir: Sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (claude) or PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR (pi). For Pi this is the only way to route workers to a specific profile that has the right providers signed in.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.modelPreset: Key into modelPresets above. Resolved args are appended before extraArgs.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.extraArgs: Appended after the preset and before the prompt. Use for per-role one-offs (e.g., `["--effort","low"]` for claude, `["--thinking","high"]` for pi).
